note: Combat Achievement tier rewards (the unlocks granted for completing ALL tasks in a tier). Keyed by tier display name. Sourced from the OSRS Wiki Combat Achievements rewards table (cross-verified, 2026-06-29). headline = the iconic unlock shown in the panel; rewards = the fuller list (tooltip/detail). Reward NAMES can drift with game updates — treat as data, refresh from the wiki.

Easy.headline: Ghommal's hilt (1)
rewards: Ghommal's hilt (1) — 3 daily teleports to the God Wars Dungeon
Antique lamp — 5,000 xp in a skill of at least level 20
'Like a boss' — boss kill-count cap raised to 40
+5% easy clue drop chance
100% bonus Warrior Guild tokens

Medium.headline: Ghommal's hilt (2)
rewards: Ghommal's hilt (2) — 5 daily GWD teleports; no Prayer drain at Barrows
Antique lamp — 10,000 xp in a skill of at least level 30
'Like a boss' — boss kill-count cap raised to 45
+5% medium clue drop chance
Dwarf multicannon holds 35 cannonballs

Hard.headline: Ghommal's hilt (3)
rewards: Ghommal's hilt (3) — unlimited GWD teleports
Antique lamp — 15,000 xp in a skill of at least level 40
'Like a boss' — boss kill-count cap raised to 50
Create dragon hunter crossbow (b) with KBD heads
Reduced GWD follower KC; better ecumenical key rate
+5% hard clue drop chance

Elite.headline: Ghommal's hilt (4) + TzTok slayer helmet
rewards: Ghommal's hilt (4) — 3 daily Mor Ul Rek teleports
TzTok slayer helmet cosmetic
Antique lamp — 25,000 xp in a skill of at least level 50
Create dragon hunter crossbow (t) with Vorkath's head
Slaughter / expeditious bracelets: 10% chance to fully recharge
'Like a boss' — boss kill-count cap raised to 55

Master.headline: Ghommal's lucky penny + Avernic defender (5)
rewards: Ghommal's hilt (5) — 5 daily Mor Ul Rek teleports
Ghommal's lucky penny — 5% chance to not consume item charges
Create Ghommal's avernic defender (5)
Vampyric slayer helmet cosmetic
Jad/Zuk Slayer tasks give 2 kills; thralls last twice as long
Antique lamp — 35,000 xp in a skill of at least level 60

Grandmaster.headline: Avernic defender (6) + TzKal slayer helmet
rewards: Ghommal's hilt (6) — unlimited Mor Ul Rek teleports
Create Ghommal's avernic defender (6)
TzKal slayer helmet cosmetic (on-task bonus at Fight Cave/Inferno when imbued)
Jad/Zuk Slayer tasks give 3 kills
Best GWD follower KC, ecumenical key rate and instance cost
Antique lamp — 50,000 xp in a skill of at least level 70
Requires completing ALL combat tasks
